speaker: MATT
raw_text: Since the Triassic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You had an announcement, if I recall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! I can officially announce as of yesterday that I am one of the new hosts of Gamestop TV. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So if you walk into a Gamestop, you can see my dumb face talking to you about games and all that stuff, along with Chris, who's been there since the beginning, but yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Where the ship set anchor on the outside of the reefs that encircle the center of these three islands, where in the center of them lies a partially submerged city of Vesrah, the last stop on Keyleth's Aramente and the water ashari that live there. You, upon arriving just past sunset, watched the city come to life, and the Vesrah come out, and upon discovering that you were allies, or at least friendly, they took you in and gave you the idea of what you had to do to finish this Aramente. Your task, to come the following day, was to be led down into the Aerie of Torrent, where the elemental rift to the water elemental plane resides, under protection, and you were to retrieve three lodestones, magical stones that are occasionally farmed from the water elemental plane as they fade from power. These stones are utilized, apparently, in both keeping the rift contained and keeping the city of Vesrah aloft and up towards the air. However, in the process of them researching where these lodestones came from, it was discovered in the most recent years that they were byproducts of one of the krakens that lives in the water elemental plane, and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A friendly prisoner. We're friendly taking a prisoner. Nicely taking a prisoner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You then eventually found yourselves, the ship reaching the outside of the Anamn Mountains-- Anamn Islands. It's been a long week.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Mainly. However, they have a degree of control over the waters that surround them. Those who have returned, the Waverunners who do these passes every few years, they speak of currents swiftly changing, it leaving bursts of darkened ink-like material to obstruct the space. And they speak of sudden surges of energy that rock through the nearby waters."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right. You mentioned it being hungry. What does it hunger for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Anything that crosses its path. You'll see, the sand below the vicinity of the rift is partially soot, dirt, and sand, but a lot of it is sprinkled bone of things that failed to make it through the rift."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I imagine it's pretty dark down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How large are these lodestones that we're looking for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We will show you these down in the Aerie tomorrow, but they're roughly--" and she gives a motion about that big in her hands. "About that large. But you can take time and research the ones that are dwindling within the temple. That way, you'll know what to look for."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And in all your experience with these beasts, are their attacks mainly physical?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so between all of you, including Trinket, you guys are able to imbue, for the next 24 hours, Water Breathing onto the party.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we're doing this in the morning, right? We're leaving first thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys just said you were doing it before--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, no, no, yes. We're doing that, but we're leaving in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, we're leaving in the morning though, at dawn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, tomorrow is when you actually venture down to the Aerie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we swim. Then I'm going to go ahead and cast Water Breathing on all of us now, because it lasts for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So how many targets can you do with that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we still breathe on land?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think it's up to ten. Let me double-check. I'm pretty sure it's ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, don't worry. In older editions, there were arguments, because they didn't specify.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have to sleep with a glass of water by the bed.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The finest of gluttonous sweets available in Tal'Dorei are summoned upon this fine mahogany table that thrusts itself out of the sand. Everyone in the vicinity steps back and kind of, "Ooh, ahh," at this display of unexpected magic. Other folks step forward to try and take a piece from it, before somebody else stops them with a hand, "It's not for you!" You guys spend the next hour eating your meal, and gain the benefits of your Heroes' Feast! (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You might want to go shark for one of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Trinket needs to go in the necklace 'cause of the odd man out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought you were being a rider.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would love to, but, there's no one to ride.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can't we have two people on one whale? I feel like whales are very large.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Especially if it's just handles, if it's just like hanging onto a piece of rope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's go eat food.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys make your way out of the small kelp farming area, eventually back to complete your-- you're doing a Heroes' Feast?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But like ice cream, and donuts, like a midnight snack kind of.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the meal I was waiting on.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "A few days. Prepared for the journey much like you did. That was the last we saw of them."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And you're sure of this? This is what the kraken does to people?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What it does to anything that crosses its path. It eats to survive."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hm. I was just wondering. If there was any other potential explanation or--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sure there is. There are many potential possibilities for anything that happens. I only have the information I was able to glean from the various scouts and teams."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Really? All right. That's not that long, really. Did she stay long?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's just not fun. All right, so morning comes to, the sun rises, it's a warm day. But the waters are crystalline and beautiful as soon as you step out. And since you haven't been here during the daytime, you can see it's a paradise-like existence. The sands that fall beneath the waves are white, just bright bleached white, and the entire city seems like the middle of this distant, tropical paradise. The islands that do kind of flank in a triangular position, as the islands of Anamn, they are just lush and green and dense. You see no signs of civilization built across them. They are just unending canopies that swarm these masses of land that break past the ocean's surface in the distance, but here in Vesrah, the city cluster, it's beautiful. The water has almost a turquoise-type shimmer when you see the areas that are deeper. And you see, in various sections, where the sand drifts away, the sandbank vanishes into the reef, and there you can see just an array of colors that refract beneath the water's surface, as a gentle breeze kind of blows through in sections.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I just want Vax and Keyleth to do the original Superman movie dialogue while he and Lois are flying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, that weird poetry! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just like slow narration of Keyleth disembodied as they're both just flying over Vesrah at night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a thing just for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think they went anywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just for you! Pass that down later.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, so! Anyone else doing anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm collecting some seashells, and taking a bit of a walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You need it! You're dirty! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (more disgruntled bear noises) It's various knots and seawater clusters--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And one of the guards wanders off, comes back a few moments later and retrieves an extra pair of goggles, and the throat bead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, you just have the base hit points of whatever creature form you take, and once you go to zero and revert back to yourself, or just revert back to yourself, then you have your hit points plus the Heroes' Feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And gameplay mechanics, can Trinket get walloped so hard that it passes all of his new form, plus Trinket form, and take him out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If it was a shit-ton of damage, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It would have to be 150 points of damage. Thereabouts, 160.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it possible to grab a spare set of goggles and choker, just in case?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- you approach Uvenda to ask this question. Even as you approach, they're looking out in the distance. She says, "Yes, that could be certainly mustered." And she snaps her little gnomish fingers.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Interestingly enough, there are similarities. It is not the same material, but you've had enough time to study whitestone, and get a feel that there are-- this is your first inclination that there are more than one substance that seems to be related to the nature of magic. This is-- at least based on the ecology and what little bit of history you've picked up from the kraken and how long it's been around-- whitestone may be one of the more recent sources of this type of power, or variation on this type of power. But there are certain comparable facets of its ability, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't, but I can fake one pretty quickly if we have to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Really? You don't have a compass. Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do we even have you here for, I mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it possible-- well, we're too deep now, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're having this conversation, you watch as Durent's patiently there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have a compass, don't you? And I'm going to hand it back to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, but I need the stone." Puts it back inside. "Okay, we're good."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If I examine it, do I detect any magic on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do. Profoundly magical, this is a very, very strong natural magic source.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is going to be weird. I'm going to take out a chunk of Whitestone residuum and just compare the color and see if there's any relation.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Look at my sheet. That's a natural 20. (all cheer)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It is! Concentration up to ten minutes. Locate Object is ten minutes. Oh, Speak With Animals is not, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He kind of looks like kelp --

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's just a face in a giant brown--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let me make sure I'm right on mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys (water sound effects) start very quietly as you can begin walking across the bottom of the floor--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- barely, your toes barely touching the surface of the bottom. Making your way in this direction. You guys slowly begin to shift this way. Following this path. Now you're maintaining Locate Object, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought it was one of these.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Looking to the left of you as you pass by this one structure, you can see the chunk of wall that's visible, it is thick enough and tall enough where it looks like it's a sliver of the base of a larger structure that was designed for far larger creatures. The sense of the erosion and the relatively smooth edges of the various broken parts to it tell you that it's been there for a very long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought it was one of these.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is! Concentration up to ten minutes. Locate Object is ten minutes. Oh, Speak With Animals is not, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Get some butter from the jug.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Some Grog aioli, a lil bit of mayo, lemon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we see anything swimming above us or around us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looking in your vicinity, you see clusters of ruins, you see broken pieces of very, very old stonework. And looking at them, they are scattered throughout the vicinity. Singular chunks of structures. Let's see. Percival, go ahead and make an intelligence check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You pull and begin clearing the space around it, and it takes you a minute or so with the help of both Taryon and Percival, but you dig enough of this sand and soot from underneath to get around and you have there, currently in your presence, one of your lodestones.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're both digging through and pulling at the sand, and dig further and it causes the black---

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're digging softly, we're trying not to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm coming too, I want to--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If anything we're sucking at this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to cast Detect Magic again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Focusing, you do feel a very, very faint magical essence from the sand about two feet to the left of where they're currently sifting through the sand.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay, Jesus! I'm just trying to help us find the fucking lodestones.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We move over there to start digging.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Start pulling through, you get past the sand, you get to some of the black murkiness and you're careful and start digging before (clunk) you feel one of your fingers hit a hard surface and you begin to pull underneath.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 13. You guys sift through the sand in this vicinity, poring around, trying to kind of dig across the exterior of the stone to pull away. You spend a good two to three minutes or so searching the vicinity and you don't find a stone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And just this little stone right over the larynx

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So our mouth is free and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (vomit sound, laughs) And this cloud of green, yellow, and brown just kind of emanates from the front of Taryon's face.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Feed the fish. Wait, quick question. Krakens don't like use shells do they like a crab?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we start looking for the lodestone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigation check. Who else is helping?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, you're looking on the compass.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog's lookout, I just need Vex and Percy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's made this its lair for the past-- for a number of years.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (garbled) Coldstone Creamery. Go for the raspberry cheesecake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, as the kraken pulls its way over, you watch as its yellow eye all of a sudden glows blue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you watch as the edge of its tentacles begin to (charging noise) give off this luminescent blue glow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And suddenly this (electricity noise) burst of electrical energy shoots forth from it and completely encompasses the surrounding-- all creatures within 120 feet have to make a constitution saving throw. All of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Plus a d4, plus a d4.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't get any-- my cloak doesn't get any bonus against this, does it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Using the people-killer-- not bad. Not bad, people-killer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a lair action for the kraken.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A lair action for the kraken? 'Cause we're in its fucking fish-tank.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. It is now the kraken's turn. The kraken is going to shift over here. Still holding you guys in this vicinity, pushes past the area, kind of reaching the ground area. We're going to say push you up to there. It's going to go ahead and make a bite attack against you, Grog, you're the largest meat in this circumstance. That is going to be a 27 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to try and-- is acrobatics a way to get out of this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, so here go. Let's roll well. I get advantage on this, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, just thought I'd see if I could sneak that through. I rolled a really-- I can't reroll that with Resolve can I? No, 'cause it's not a save.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a big-ass kraken, though, it's not bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16? You try and slide through, but it's holding too fast. You can't escape, unfortunately. So that's your action.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I have anything-- with anything else, do I have anything I can do? Is there a bonus action thing I can do here? No, I am just-- yeah. I think about how easy it would be to reload my gun right now if I had one.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, lasts for ten minutes while you're concentrating, did you maintain concentration--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you are grappled by the tentacle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That brings us to the next lair action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everything is still obscured in this black inky space, by the way. Oh, you guys missed that while you were away. The kraken did an ink jet and filled this entire 60-foot radius with ink. The whole area is drastically obscured.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Even though there's my Control Water current going outward? Which lasts for ten minutes!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right at this point, as it is now the 20 count on the lair action, the kraken once again gives another pulse of electrical energy, everything in the area, I need everyone to go ahead and make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I already saved for it while I was inside of him. I can save again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, but you just took damage from the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From the tentacles. However, you are correct, the water jet did clear out the ink from this area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Plus bless, which is good. Wait, what was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was three, thank you, three. Sorry, constitution.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's enough, you maintain concentration. So yeah, so you've now cleared out this section, this section is cleared of ink. Control Water, the stream you've been doing has cleared out this area, so yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Keyleth, it's your turn. You come to consciousness. Once more you watch as Vax is darting off and a tentacle wraps around him. You see Taryon pulled, but the rest of your allies are rushing off in the distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah I kind of went unconscience.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are hasted, so yeah, 30 feet. You just get out of the range. It's going to take an attack of opportunity on you with its tentacle. That is-- nine plus 18 is 27 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Halved to ten and you are grappled by the tentacle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We just gotta get out of here. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna kill this stupid sea puppy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't kill it. Don't kill it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't kill it, get us out of there!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No! No, no, no. Get us out. Get us out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It is now the Kraken's turn. At the top of the round, you lose a death saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not really gonna help in this situation. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I got-- Other than-- Yeah, I got nothing. Other than trying to distract it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. End of your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I pull back through the portal, obviously, but.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. As you pull back through and it returns, it's gonna ahead and use-- It's taking another legendary action to make a-- This is gonna be a tentacle attack against you, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage, that's going to be nine plus 18, that's 27?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take 12 points of bludgeoning damage plus ten, that's 22. Divided by that. 11.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Nope! Ah, as you're pulled inside the voice comes up again and it's now emanating outward to you as well, Vex, and in the unconscious darkness of Vax and Keyleth, the voice just says, "I've been here a long time, and I'll be here long after you are dust. Feed me and give me sustenance, I'll find my way through somehow." Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is Tary-- Tary's still held on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're being pulled up over the rock and dragged across.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Like, oh god. Over there. That's a 34. You take-- this shit's getting intense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And it swallows you a second time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good, then you can get Vax out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can get Vax out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You guys think this is part of a plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are consumed and restrained once again in its dark space inside as you're pulled into the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends its turn, Grog, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ah, it's my turn now? I don't even get like a second to think about it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You are no longer grappled. There is one slightly damaged tentacle left. As you do so, the voice says, "No. Come, join your end here in the depths." All right, that ends your Retaliation, Percy's, it is now-- Wait, so that was Percy's turn, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nobody else is grappled right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're gone, you're gone. You're chill with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm-- There is nothing I can do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. End of your turn, the last legendary action to attempt to grab and grapple Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take nine-- ten points of bludgeoning damage, being reduced, and you are grappled.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To five? Oh, ten is reduced?
